title: elymus antiquus
intro: Elymus antiquus is an extinct species of wild grass or wheat, belonging to the family Poaceae. This ancient plant is believed to have been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various ailments. The health benefits of Elymus antiquus are said to include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which could help to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Elymus antiquus can be prepared through herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, but further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
